modules.title: Classroom Culture
modules.description: Learn how to build a positive, inclusive, and engaging classroom environment from day one. Covers norms, expectations, and culture-setting techniques.

videos.title: Building Classroom Culture
videos.description: How to create a welcoming, structured environment that encourages participation and respect.

resources.title: Classroom Culture Cheat Sheet
resources.description: Quick reference guide for building classroom culture on day one.

checkpoints.title: Watch the Classroom Culture video
checkpoints.description: Watch the full video on building classroom culture.

checkpoints.title: Identify 3 norms for your classroom
checkpoints.description: Write down 3 non-negotiable norms you will set for your classroom.

checkpoints.title: Draft your class opening routine
checkpoints.description: Plan the first 2 minutes of your class — how you will greet students and set the tone.

modules.title: First 10 Minutes of Your Class
modules.description: Master the critical opening minutes of your class. Learn how to hook students, set expectations, and build momentum from the start.

videos.title: The First 10 Minutes
videos.description: How to structure the opening of your class for maximum engagement and momentum.

segments.title: The Do-Now: Getting Students Working Immediately

resources.title: First 10 Minutes Planning Template
resources.description: Template for planning your class opening sequence.

checkpoints.title: Watch the First 10 Minutes video
checkpoints.description: Watch the full video on structuring your class opening.

checkpoints.title: Plan a Do-Now activity
checkpoints.description: Write a specific Do-Now activity for the first class of your curriculum.

checkpoints.title: Plan your hook
checkpoints.description: Write a hook that will capture student attention and connect to your topic.

modules.title: I Do, You Do, We Do
modules.description: Learn the gradual release of responsibility model — the backbone of effective teaching. Move from instructor modeling to guided practice to independent work.

videos.title: I Do, You Do, We Do
videos.description: The gradual release of responsibility framework for structuring any lesson.
videos.videoUrl: [PLACEHOLDER - I Do You Do We Do Video]

segments.title: You Do: Independent Practice and Checks

resources.title: Gradual Release Planning Guide
resources.description: Step-by-step guide for planning lessons using the I Do / We Do / You Do framework.

checkpoints.title: Watch the I Do, You Do, We Do video
checkpoints.description: Watch the full video on the gradual release of responsibility model.

checkpoints.title: Identify the 3 phases in your lesson plan
checkpoints.description: Label where the I Do, We Do, and You Do phases appear in one of your lesson sessions.

checkpoints.title: Plan a check for understanding
checkpoints.description: Write a quick check-for-understanding question you will use during the We Do phase.

modules.title: Lesson Design Studio: Build Your Curriculum
modules.description: Put it all together by building your curriculum in the Lesson Design Studio. This is your capstone — apply what you learned about culture, openings, and lesson structure to create a complete, ready-to-teach curriculum.

videos.title: Lesson Design Studio Walkthrough
videos.description: A guided tour of the Lesson Design Studio — how to build your curriculum step by step.

resources.title: Curriculum Design Best Practices
resources.description: Tips and examples for building a strong, student-centered curriculum.

checkpoints.title: Complete the Studio onboarding tour
checkpoints.description: Complete the guided onboarding tour in the Lesson Design Studio.

checkpoints.title: Create your first week with at least 3 activities
checkpoints.description: Build your first week plan with a minimum of three activities.

checkpoints.title: Set a learning objective for at least one week
checkpoints.description: Define a clear learning objective for at least one week in your curriculum.

checkpoints.title: Add an at-home assignment to at least one week
checkpoints.description: Include an at-home assignment in at least one week of your curriculum.
